description_for_human: Per-facility climate + supply risk dossiers grounded in your Fabric Lakehouse.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to assess operational resilience of the user's facilities against weather hazards (heat, wildfire) and a 1-hop supply graph. Tools: assessResilience runs the full per-facility scoring workflow and returns a dossier with scores, drivers, evidence, and citations. listFacilities returns the facility registry the user has access to. getResilienceSnapshot returns a static PNG map of an existing assessment. getResilienceHealth is a lightweight readiness probe.

conversation_starters.text: Which TX facilities are at risk this week?
Show wildfire risk for all my sites over the next 10 days.

functions.name: assessResilience
functions.description: Run a per-facility resilience assessment across the user's accessible facility registry, fusing weather + supply graph + business-continuity playbook context. Returns scored dossiers.

functions.name: listFacilities
functions.description: List the facilities the current user has access to in the resilience registry. Lightweight; runs no weather or supply queries.

functions.name: getResilienceSnapshot
functions.description: Fetch a static PNG map for an assessment id, suitable for inline display in adaptive cards.

functions.name: getResilienceHealth
functions.description: Readiness probe for the resilience subsystem. Returns whether the agent is configured and reachable.
